response.justification: Strong match: a long-tenured fullstack engineer currently working in TypeScript/Node with direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, which is the rarest requirement in this JD. He comfortably exceeds the 6+ years bar, has React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure, a CS degree, and an exceptional testing/TDD pedigree (authored test frameworks, taught testing courses). The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience, no Kotlin and only dated Java, and recent frontend depth that historically leans Ember.js more than React — all learnable given his demonstrated polyglot range.
strengths: Current fullstack TypeScript/Node work plus hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator experience
Deep testing and software-craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing workshops
Broad platform range with databases (MongoDB, MySQL), Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated (circa 2009-2011)
Recent React depth unclear; frontend history features Ember.js more prominently

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
